meaning: n.(动物之)骨架,骨骼,基干,纲要,万能钥匙
examples: The human skeleton consists of 206 bones.
The skeleton has been dated at about 2000 BC.
Only the concrete skeleton of the factory remained.
Anka Clarke has described herself as a "scarcely living pregnant skeleton" at this point.
The mammalian skeleton is consistently recognisable in creatures as various as bats, monkeys, horses and humans.
